Text: 🚨 SOMEONE JUST BUILT a Claude Code skill called /brag that turns any side project into a fire ~20-second launch video in seconds

You just tell Claude “hey, let’s /brag about this” and it instantly generates a polished trailer — complete with music, smooth motion, sound effects, and ready-to-share copy.

No more “I built something cool” posts with static screenshots that get buried. This actually makes your project look professional and shareable without spending hours editing.

It runs on HyperFrames (HeyGen’s open-source HTML-to-video engine), comes with multiple style presets, and the creator even added demos for fake projects so you can test it right away.

This feels like one of those “why didn’t I think of this” tools that every indie hacker and builder is going to start using for launches.

Free. Open source. Stupidly easy.

Who’s trying this on their next project? 🔥
